title: Aureline notebook comments, stable cell or output anchors, and review-workspace parity
description: Boundary schema for notebook comments, stable anchors, and review-workspace parity records. Every record that crosses the comment/anchor/parity boundary (comment, anchor, review-workspace parity, comment-anchor packet) projects through this schema. Raw notebook JSON bodies, raw cell source bytes, raw output bytes, raw kernel-protocol frames, raw widget state bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear in any record; records carry refs only. Additive-optional fields do not bump the schema_version; repurposing an existing member is breaking.

notebook_comment_anchor_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the notebook comment/anchor/parity module. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles.

opaque_ref.description: Opaque ref to another record (cell id, output id, anchor id, comment id, document id, etc.). Consumers resolve refs through the owning registry.

notebook_comment_target_class.description: Frozen comment-target vocabulary. Names whether the comment is anchored to a cell, an output within a cell, or notebook-level metadata.

notebook_comment_status_class.description: Frozen comment-status vocabulary. Names the lifecycle state of a comment so the review surface never presents a resolved or redacted comment as active.

notebook_comment_thread_state.description: Frozen comment-thread-state vocabulary. Names whether the comment is a single standalone note, part of an open thread, resolved, or stale because the anchor has drifted.

notebook_anchor_kind.description: Frozen anchor-kind vocabulary. Names whether the anchor points to a cell or to an output within a cell so consumers know which runtime boundary applies.

notebook_review_workspace_parity_class.description: Frozen review-workspace-parity vocabulary. Names the level of parity between the notebook document and its review-workspace projection.

notebook_review_workspace_downgrade_reas.description: Frozen review-workspace-downgrade-reason vocabulary. Names why review-workspace parity is less than full so the UI can show truthful degraded-state labels instead of optimistic placeholder language.

reply_refs.description: Opaque refs to reply comments bound to this comment.

downgrade_reasons.description: Downgrade reasons when parity is not full.

anchor_refs.description: Opaque refs to anchor records known in the review workspace.

comment_refs.description: Opaque refs to comment records known in the review workspace.

as_of.description: UTC date this packet is current as of.

comment_target_classes.description: Closed vocabulary: comment target classes. Must list every variant.

comment_status_classes.description: Closed vocabulary: comment status classes. Must list every variant.

comment_thread_states.description: Closed vocabulary: comment thread states. Must list every variant.

anchor_kinds.description: Closed vocabulary: anchor kinds. Must list every variant.

review_workspace_parity_classes.description: Closed vocabulary: review workspace parity classes. Must list every variant.

review_workspace_downgrade_reasons.description: Closed vocabulary: review workspace downgrade reasons. Must list every variant.
